title: Heart
overview: Ga-young, a filmmaker, visits Seong-bum, an art instructor, to consult on her affair with a married man. The two were once lovers of each other, though that does not stop Seong-bum from becoming a love counselor for Ga-young. Yet, they don′t just consult, but begin exploring new feelings for each other.
